prestazioni: BMW B48B20C (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) engine: Replace the stock turbo with a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger, featuring a 62mm compressor wheel and 64mm turbine wheel, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control up to 28 psi.

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management system with custom rally-spec fuel and ignition maps, integrated with a Bosch Motorsport 0261230150 high-pressure fuel pump and ID1000x injectors for E85 compatibility, alongside a custom 3-inch aluminum intercooler piping kit with a PWR 450mm x 220mm x 76mm bar-and-plate intercooler.

Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 300mm travel, custom valving for gravel rally stages, and reinforced spherical bearing top mounts, paired with a Morgan-specific front subframe reinforcement kit from RML Group and a 32mm rear anti-roll bar from Whiteline for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Morgan Works, featuring flared front fenders with integrated LED light pods (Hella Rallye 3000 FF fog lights) and a rear clamshell with a 3D-printed carbon diffuser for improved airflow, all finished in matte graphite with exposed weave accents.

Full Sparco Circuit II HANS-compatible racing seats with custom Morgan CX-T Rally embroidery, mounted on Sparco Pro 2000 slider rails and paired with a Sabelt 6-point harness and a MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel with a quick-release hub.

Rally-spec livery by Camo Designs, featuring a bespoke 'Arctic Fox' vinyl wrap with 3M 1080 Series matte white base, high-visibility orange accents, and Morgan CX-T Rally decals in reflective 3M Scotchlite for night stages, paired with a custom aluminum skid plate and rock sliders from Rally Armor.
